paper_focus.title: Effect of annealing temperature on the microstructure and tensile properties of Fe–10Mn–10Al–0.7C low-density steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify the effect of annealing temperature on the microstructure evolution and tensile properties of a Mn-lean Fe–10Mn–10Al–0.7C low-density steel, and to establish microstructure-property relationships governing strength and ductility.
main_process_variables: annealing temperature: 700–1200 °C, holding time: 1 h, water quenching
hot rolling finishing temperature: ~880 °C, water quench to ~300 °C
